rearViewKey.title: Rear View Key
rearViewKey.tooltip: Key to press to see the rear view mirror

rearViewToggle.title: Toggle Rear View
rearViewToggle.tooltip: Toggle or hold key to view rear view

moveRearViewCamera.title: Move camera behind player body
moveRearViewCamera.tooltip: Moves camera 2m back, the player body will otherwise block the camera

mirrorRearViewCamera.title: Mirror rear view camera display
mirrorRearViewCamera.tooltip: Flips the camera output when set to Mirror

rearViewCameraX.title: Rear View Camera X
rearViewCameraX.tooltip: X pos of the bottom left corner of the rear view display

rearViewCameraY.title: Rear View Camera Y
rearViewCameraY.tooltip: Y pos of the bottom left corner of the rear view display

rearViewCameraWidth.title: Rear View Camera Width
rearViewCameraWidth.tooltip: Width of the rear view display

rearViewCameraHeight.title: Rear View Camera Height
rearViewCameraHeight.tooltip: Height of the rear view display
